title: COMMAND COUNT

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns [Integer reply]() of number of total commands in this Redis server. ## Examples COMMAND COUNT ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of commands returned by `COMMAND`. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of commands returned by `COMMAND`.
intro: Returns [Integer reply]() of number of total commands in this Redis server.

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of commands returned by `COMMAND`.
